items.title: Migration adds share_token/priority/details and backfills a unique token for every ticket
items.precondition: A Postgres DB at the prior schema
items.expected: Migration applies; share_token is NOT NULL + unique on all rows; priority CHECK + details jsonb added
items.evidence: npm run migrate -> 'Batch 1 run: 7 migrations' against a fresh test DB (pm_tool_rt_test); up() ran the add-columns + backfill + NOT NULL/unique + CHECK without error
items.notes: Migration renamed to 20260625000010 to avoid a timestamp collision with the parallel project-context-bits branch.

items.title: Public GET /shared/tickets/:token returns ticket content with NO auth
items.precondition: A generated ticket exists with a known share_token
items.expected: 200 + { success, data, error } envelope; data carries user_story, acceptance_criteria, effort, priority, details, status, rendered_markdown
items.evidence: SharedTicketController.test.ts (supertest, real app) asserts 200 + envelope + fields; SharedTicketService.test.ts asserts the projection

items.title: Public payload exposes ONLY content (no id, session_id, share_token, or comments)
items.precondition: A generated ticket with a known token
items.expected: data.id, data.session_id, data.share_token, data.comments are all undefined; only content fields present
items.evidence: SharedTicketController.test.ts + SharedTicketService.test.ts both assert internal identifiers are absent (§5.4)

items.title: Unknown but well-formed token returns 404 without leaking existence
items.evidence: SharedTicketController.test.ts asserts 404 + code; SharedTicketService.test.ts asserts the throw

items.title: Malformed token is rejected at the boundary (400)
Generation persists the enriched fields (priority, details) + mints a share token
items.expected: The draft ticket carries priority, details (key decisions/open questions/etc.), and a unique share_token
items.evidence: TicketGenerationService.test.ts (agent mocked to the enriched shape) + TicketModel.test.ts round-trip priority/details/share_token; full suite 198 tests pass

items.title: Edit/finalize re-render keeps the enrichment sections and persists priority
items.expected: Priority edit persists + re-renders; rich sections survive the re-render; version guard intact
items.evidence: TicketController.test.ts (edit/finalize 200, version bump, 409 conflict) + TicketModel.test.ts (priority edit persists); markdown render covered by TicketMarkdownService.test.ts

items.title: A generated ticket shows all sections in-app; empty sections are hidden
items.precondition: Run the worktree dev server (the existing preview serves main, not this branch)
steps: 1. Start the wizard, generate a ticket
items.expected: Story, Problem/Background, Criteria, Key Decisions, Open Questions, Success Metrics, Dependencies, Codebase Grounding, Effort, Priority, Context render; empty sections are omitted
items.evidence: Frontend verified by tsc (strict) + production build + eslint; TicketReadView is pure presentational over the API-tested shape. Browser pass not run: the live preview serves the main checkout, not this worktree.
items.notes: Needs a manual UI pass against a worktree dev server.

items.title: Copy produces a short block ending in a working 'View full ticket' link
items.precondition: A generated ticket open in the app
items.expected: Compact Markdown (story + criteria + effort + priority) ending in [View full ticket](<origin>/?ticket=<token>)
items.evidence: buildShortTicketMarkdown is a pure util (tsc + build clean). Browser pass not run (see T-ui-1).

items.title: Opening /?ticket=<token> renders the full ticket read-only (no edit/finalize/comments)
items.expected: The full ticket renders read-only; a bad token shows a clean 'invalid or no longer available' state
items.evidence: App.tsx reads ?ticket on mount -> SharedTicketView -> useSharedTicket (endpoint covered by T-api-1/2/3). Browser pass not run (see T-ui-1).
